3.name: Sand
3.description: Throw sand in target's gun - increases jam chance by 15%

4.name: Gun Brush
4.description: Clean your gun - decreases jam chance by 10%

5.name: Bread
5.description: Attract ducks - increases duck spawn rate for 20 minutes

6.name: Hunter's Insurance
6.description: Protects against friendly fire penalties for 24 hours - no XP loss or gun confiscation

7.name: Buy Gun Back
7.description: Get your confiscated gun back with the same ammo it had when taken

8.name: Bucket of Water
8.description: Splash another hunter - soaks their clothes and prevents shooting until they dry off

9.name: Dry Clothes
9.description: Change into dry clothes - allows shooting again after being soaked

10.name: 4-Leaf Clover
10.description: Crazy luck for 10 minutes - greatly boosts hit & befriend success

11.name: Binoculars
11.description: Peek at the current duck type in this channel (sent via PM)

12.name: Hunting Dog
12.description: Your trusty dog retrieves the next duck that flies away and re-spawns it (active for 12 hours)

13.name: Scope
13.description: Precision scope: +20% accuracy for your next 5 shots (active for 12 hours)

14.name: Body Armor
14.description: Absorbs your next XP loss event (misfire penalty, friendly fire, etc.)

15.name: Decoy Trap
15.description: Plant a trap on a player - their next !bef attempt fails and they lose XP

16.name: Mystery Box
16.description: Open a random mystery box - could be fantastic or... not. Good luck!
